description: US-414 diagnostics output eval (Slice A — parser tier). Golden cases over the always-on error-tolerant front end (no gst, no VS Code). Drives parse() → toDiagnostics() and asserts: clean sources are silent; malformed sources publish parser diagnostics with source `smalltalk` / code `parse` (badge `smalltalk(parse)`), severity as the parser emits, and a sane line range. Metrics: expectClean (no diagnostics), expectMinCount, expectCode, expectSeverity (all diagnostics), expectOnLine (some diagnostic starts on a 0-based line), expectMessageIncludes (some diagnostic message contains the substring).

cases.name: clean source is silent
cases.text:
| x |
x := 1.
Transcript showCr: x printString.

cases.name: missing ] flags an error on the last line
unterminated string literal flags an error with a span
